title: ficus superba var. henneana
intro: Ficus superba var. henneana, also known as the Ficus henneana, is a species of fig tree native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Ficus superba var. henneana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or bark in hot water.
